name: hcportal_toggleKennelSong
description: Toggles whether a song is associated with a kennel. @publicKennelId is resolved to the internal HC.Kennel.id (@kennelId) before all KennelSongMap operations — fixing the HC5 bug where @publicKennelId was used directly and no songs were ever actually toggled. If adding (@isInKennel=1), either creates a new KennelSongMap record or un-soft-deletes an existing one (Removed=0). If removing (@isInKennel=0), soft-deletes the mapping (Removed=1). All writes wrapped in a transaction.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: The public kennel GUID used to resolve the internal Kennel.id (@kennelId), which is then used in all KennelSongMap operations. Validated IS NULL after auth.

parameters.name: songId
parameters.description: The song to add or remove from the kennel. Also passed as the paramString to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. Validated IS NULL.

parameters.name: isInKennel
parameters.description: Toggle flag: 1 = add song to kennel (insert or un-soft-delete), 0 = remove song from kennel (soft-delete). Validated to be exactly 0 or 1; NULL or other values return an error.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned after the song association has been successfully added or removed.

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.KennelSongMap when adding a song that has no existing mapping (uses resolved internal @kennelId)
UPDATE HC.KennelSongMap.Removed = 0 and updatedAt when adding a song that already has a mapping (un-soft-delete, uses resolved internal @kennelId)
UPDATE HC.KennelSongMap.Removed = 1 and updatedAt when removing a song (soft-delete, uses resolved internal @kennelId)
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
